package rulecoverage

func PositiveColumnNameLiteralsDuplicatedOutsideRepository() string {
    ruleID := "column_name_literals_duplicated_outside_repository"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated column-name strings outside repository or query packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
